strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms (Optilyz, RIDE, WatchUp), directly matching the core stack
Proven fullstack range from databases to UI, plus DevOps exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS CDK) covering several nice-to-haves
Strong software craftsmanship foundation — TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, clean architecture interest, and active community teaching
concerns: Listed title is Senior/Staff while the role is entry-level — seniority alignment worth confirming
Relational/PostgreSQL experience is implied via SQL skill but MongoDB is the primary database shown
Berlin-based which suits on-site requirement, though on-site availability is not explicitly stated

key_factors.factor: Cloud, Kubernetes, and AWS nice-to-have coverage
AI/LLM and MCP agentic tooling experience at re:cinq

response.justification: The candidate brings exactly the core stack the role needs — TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST/web architecture and clean-architecture discipline — proven across several Berlin product companies. On top of that, they cover virtually every nice-to-have: AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, Docker, and current hands-on work with LLMs and MCP agentic tooling at re:cinq. Their craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, public workshops) signals a strong learner and collaborator who can grow quickly into the platform's energy-consulting and renovation workflows while immediately contributing across the stack.
